texto: I think New Orleans is such a beautiful city. It looks like a fairytale when you walk through the French Quarter or the Garden District. There is such a lush sense of color, style, architecture - and the people themselves.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anika Noni Rose: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “I think New Orleans is such a beautiful city. It looks like a fairytale when you walk through the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beautiful, color pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de color e walk.
